allow: Bash(/c/Users/xunyuzi/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links/jq.exe '.downloads | length as $total | \(map\(.downloads\) | add\) as $sum | {days: $total, total_downloads: $sum, daily_avg: \($sum / $total | floor\)}')

Bash(/c/Users/xunyuzi/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links/jq.exe '{name: .full_name, stars: .stargazers_count, created_at: .created_at, pushed_at: .pushed_at, language: .language, topics: .topics, license: .license.spdx_id}')
Bash(mysql -h127.0.0.1 -P13306 -ucodenexus -pcodenexus codenexus -e "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM arena_room GROUP BY status;")
Bash(mysql -h127.0.0.1 -P13306 -ucodenexus -pcodenexus codenexus -e "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM arena_room WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status;")
Bash(mysql -h127.0.0.1 -P13306 -ucodenexus -pcodenexus codenexus -e "UPDATE arena_room SET status = 'FIGHTING' WHERE status = 'BATTLING' AND is_deleted = 0;")
